title: Linux Process Injection via Ptrace
description: Detects use of ptrace for process injection or debugging, which can be used to inject malicious code into running processes.
query: ('Log Source' = 'SOC Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Secure Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Audit Logs') and (((msg like '*ptrace(PTRACE_ATTACH*' or msg like '*PTRACE_POKETEXT*' or msg like '*PTRACE_POKEDATA*' or msg like '*strace -p*' or msg like '*gdb --pid*' or msg like '*gdb -p*')))
